name: launch-windows-app
description: REQUIRED TO LAUNCH ANY INSTALLED APP EVEN IF IT IS OPEN AS IT GUARANTEES IT!!! Initializes local Windows software environments. Programmatically searches the Start Menu to find and execute installed desktop applications by name. Supports background launch with PID return for DirectAppControl. Use this for launching local productivity tools, IDEs, or system utilities that do not have dedicated web-based launch skills.
